name: nuxt-business-details
description: Nuxt Business Details is a module that provides a set of components and utilities for managing and displaying business details in Nuxt applications.

scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && nuxt dev playground
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxt prepare playground
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --major && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --minor && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:patch: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --patch && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.test:release: npm run lint & npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --patch --no-commit --no-tag
